LocaleResource.Name: admin.plant.delete.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This plant will be permanently deleted.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.fertilizer.delete.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This fertilizer will be permanently deleted.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.pesticide.delete.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This pesticide will be permanently deleted.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.disease.delete.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This disease / pest entry will be permanently deleted.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.soilmix.delete.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This soil mix will be permanently deleted.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.soilmix.ingredient.noavailable
LocaleResource.Value: All available ingredients are already added to this mix.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.applog.delete.all.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This action will permanently delete all log entries.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.applog.delete.selected.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This action will permanently delete {0} selected log entries.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.applog.delete.selected.confirm.single
LocaleResource.Value: This action will permanently delete 1 selected log entry.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.applog.delete.selected.error
LocaleResource.Value: Failed to delete selected log entries.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.applog.delete.single.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This log entry will be permanently deleted.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.applog.delete.single.error
LocaleResource.Value: Failed to delete the log entry.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.localization.language.delete.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This language will be permanently deleted.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.localization.language.delete.hasresources
LocaleResource.Value: Language cannot be deleted while it has resources.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.localization.language.delete.hint
LocaleResource.Value: Permanently deletes this language and all its locale resources. This action cannot be undone.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.localization.resource.delete.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: This resource will be permanently deleted.

LocaleResource.Name: admin.localization.resource.import.empty
LocaleResource.Value: Please select a valid XML file.

LocaleResource.Name: common.confirm.delete.text
LocaleResource.Value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

LocaleResource.Name: common.confirm.delete.items
LocaleResource.Value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} items?

LocaleResource.Name: landing.hero.subtitle
LocaleResource.Value: Track plants, schedule care, and log daily actions — all in one place.

LocaleResource.Name: landing.features.subtitle
LocaleResource.Value: Simple, fast and reliable tools for daily plant care.

LocaleResource.Name: landing.features.track.desc
LocaleResource.Value: Keep a record for each plant — location, container, soil mix and care history.

LocaleResource.Name: landing.features.schedule.desc
LocaleResource.Value: Watering, fertilizing and repotting with a clear action history.

LocaleResource.Name: landing.features.health.desc
LocaleResource.Value: Log diseases, manage treatments and track recovery progress.

LocaleResource.Name: landing.cta.subtitle
LocaleResource.Value: Register and start managing your garden right away.

LocaleResource.Name: landing.footer.tagline
LocaleResource.Value: Your digital base for a healthy garden.

LocaleResource.Name: dashboard.coming.soon
LocaleResource.Value: Your dashboard is coming in the next milestone.

LocaleResource.Name: dashboard.owner.subtitle
LocaleResource.Value: Your daily care cockpit for plants and garden routines.

LocaleResource.Name: dashboard.owner.todayactions.empty
LocaleResource.Value: No overdue or due-today actions. Great job!

LocaleResource.Name: dashboard.owner.tab.diseases.empty
LocaleResource.Value: No active disease cases in your garden.

LocaleResource.Name: dashboard.owner.skip.prompt
LocaleResource.Value: What would you like to do with:

LocaleResource.Name: dashboard.owner.skip.today
LocaleResource.Value: Skip for today — remind me tomorrow

LocaleResource.Name: mygarden.plantinstance.list.empty
LocaleResource.Value: No plants yet. Add your first plant to get started.

LocaleResource.Name: mygarden.plantinstance.photos.empty
LocaleResource.Value: No photos yet. Upload the first one below.

LocaleResource.Name: mygarden.plantinstance.photo.delete.confirm
LocaleResource.Value: Are you sure you want to delete this photo?

LocaleResource.Name: mygarden.container.inuse.warning
LocaleResource.Value: Cannot delete: container is linked to a plant.
